name: Dify
one_liner: Open-source LLMOps platform for building agentic AI workflows. 51st most-starred OSS project on GitHub, runs on 1.4M+ machines.

founders.name: Luyu Zhang
founders.background: MS from USC. Former Product Director at Tencent CODING (DevOps platform).

name: Voyage AI
one_liner: Built state-of-the-art embedding models and rerankers for RAG systems. Used by Anthropic, Harvey, Replit. Acquired by MongoDB for $220M.

founders.name: Tengyu Ma
founders.background: Assistant Professor at Stanford. BS from Tsinghua University. PhD from Princeton. Previously at Google and Facebook.

funding_rounds.notes: Acquired by MongoDB for $220M in Feb 2025, less than 2 years after founding.

name: Lamini
one_liner: Enterprise generative AI platform for building and running customized LLMs. Close partnerships with AMD and Meta. Backed by Andrew Ng and Andrej Karpathy.

founders.name: Sharon Zhou
founders.background: PhD AI from Stanford (advised by Andrew Ng). Harvard BSc in CS & Classics. Former Google ML PM. MIT Tech Review 35 Under 35.

founders.name: Greg Diamos
founders.background: Co-founded MLCommons/MLPerf. Led AI research at Baidu. Former NVIDIA CUDA team architect.

name: Hyperbolic Labs
one_liner: Open-access AI cloud providing GPU marketplace and serverless inference. Decentralized compute platform.

founders.name: Jasper (Yue) Zhang
founders.background: PhD Mathematics UC Berkeley (completed in 2 years). Gold Medalist at Alibaba Global Math Competition and Chinese Mathematical Olympiad. Previously at Citadel Securities.

founders.name: Yuchen Jin
founders.background: PhD CS University of Washington. BS from Huazhong University of Science & Technology. Built Apache TVM. Former Sr. Engineering Manager at OctoML.
